blocked_reasons.description: commands_home is missing, empty, or invalid.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Ensure OPENCODE_CONFIG_ROOT is set or binding evidence is valid.

blocked_reasons.description: Installer-owned binding evidence file is missing.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Restore governance.paths.json at ${CONFIG_ROOT} and rerun.

blocked_reasons.description: Required canonical variables could not be resolved deterministically.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Fix binding paths and rerun bootstrap evidence collection.

blocked_reasons.description: Workspace persistence contract failed for required artifacts.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Resolve lock/path issues and rerun persistence helper.

blocked_reasons.description: Engine selfcheck failed and runtime activation is blocked.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Repair deterministic contracts and rerun selfcheck governance.

blocked_reasons.description: Repository identity could not be resolved under active policy.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Provide git identity evidence or run from a valid repository root.

blocked_reasons.description: Requested surface requires stricter system mode.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Switch to system mode or narrow requested operation scope.

blocked_reasons.description: Requested operation violates operating-mode minimum requirements.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Use required mode or reduce operation scope.

blocked_reasons.description: Persisted session state is stale for current deterministic contract.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Rehydrate session state from canonical evidence and rerun.

blocked_reasons.description: Pack lock is required but missing.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Generate deterministic pack lock and retry.

blocked_reasons.description: Observed pack lock is invalid.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Regenerate pack lock from canonical manifest set.

blocked_reasons.description: Observed pack lock hash differs from expected hash.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Sync lockfile with selected packs and engine version.

blocked_reasons.description: Selected packs define conflicting surface ownership.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Resolve pack conflicts before activation.

blocked_reasons.description: Observed ruleset hash does not match expected deterministic hash.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Recompute ruleset hash and refresh persisted state.

blocked_reasons.description: Observed activation hash does not match expected deterministic hash.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Regenerate activation metadata from current canonical inputs.

blocked_reasons.description: Release hygiene checks failed under strict mode.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Fix release metadata and rerun hygiene selfcheck.

blocked_reasons.description: Legacy session-state format is unsupported in active rollout phase.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Migrate session state to current schema version.

blocked_reasons.description: Blocked decision without a more specific canonical reason code.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Inspect deterministic gate evidence and map to specific reason code.

blocked_reasons.description: Persistence target resolved to forbidden or degenerate location.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Repair persistence path inputs and retry atomic write.

blocked_reasons.description: Persistence path violates allowed contract boundaries.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Use canonical workspace/config-root scoped persistence paths.

blocked_reasons.description: Installer precheck failed because required source artifacts are missing.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Restore installer source files or extract a valid release bundle.

blocked_reasons.description: Installer could not find governance version metadata.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Ensure VERSION contains a valid semantic version.

blocked_reasons.description: Installer config root is invalid or unusable.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Provide a writable canonical config root and rerun installer.

blocked_reasons.description: Model identity source is not trusted for the required operation.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Set model identity from installer-owned binding file (OPENCODE_BINDING_FILE).

blocked_reasons.description: Pipeline mode requires explicit model context limit from binding_env.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Set OPENCODE_MODEL_CONTEXT_LIMIT in binding file. Only binding_env is trusted in pipeline.

blocked_reasons.description: Model context limit is invalid (negative value).
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: context_limit must be >= 0. Negative values are invalid in all modes.

blocked_reasons.description: Model context limit could not be determined from any source.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Explicitly set OPENCODE_MODEL_CONTEXT_LIMIT. Hardcoded inference is not permitted.

blocked_reasons.description: Provider metadata API fetch failed.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Check provider API connectivity or use explicit context limit from activation pack.

blocked_reasons.description: Model identity source is not a valid trust level.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Use one of: binding_env, host_capability, provider_metadata, process_env, llm_context, user_input, inferred, unresolved.

blocked_reasons.description: Host capabilities do not satisfy required permission policy.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Run with required host permissions or narrow target surface.

blocked_reasons.description: Command execution capability is disallowed for this run.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Enable required execution capability in host policy.

blocked_reasons.description: Session state fingerprint does not match live repo identity.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Re-bootstrap session state from current repo root.

blocked_reasons.description: Governance release artifact SHA256 hash does not match stored hashes.json. File may be corrupted or tampered with.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Rebuild governance release artifacts with build_ruleset_lock.py or restore from a known-good release.

blocked_reasons.description: Repository root cannot be resolved deterministically from explicit/env/git evidence.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Set OPENCODE_REPO_ROOT or pass explicit repo-root pointing to a valid git root.

blocked_reasons.description: Decision-pack contains legacy interactive A/B prompt wording before Phase 4.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Normalize decision-pack to automatic policy wording and rerun persistence.

blocked_reasons.description: Response contract validation rejected next_action for current phase/gate.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Use next_action.type=command before phase 4 and rerun response rendering.

blocked_reasons.description: Bootstrap gates are not satisfied; kernel cannot proceed.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Run the local bootstrap launcher to complete bootstrap evidence collection.

blocked_reasons.description: Valid bootstrap evidence is required before governance execution can proceed.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Execute the local bootstrap launcher to establish start-order evidence.

blocked_reasons.description: Core rules file (rules.md) could not be loaded.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Restore rules.md at the expected governance path.

blocked_reasons.description: Core rulebook load failed at Phase 4 entry.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Restore rulebook files and rerun /continue.

blocked_reasons.description: Required active profile is missing and cannot be resolved.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Select a valid profile or provide profile evidence.

blocked_reasons.description: Profile resolution is non-deterministic due to ambiguity.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Resolve profile ambiguity by explicit selection or evidence.

blocked_reasons.description: No valid decision options can be produced for the current gate.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Provide required decision evidence or inputs.

blocked_reasons.description: Required templates cannot be resolved or loaded.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Restore template files at expected governance paths.

blocked_reasons.description: Unresolved top-tier rulebook file blocks activation.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Provide the missing rulebook file at the expected path.

blocked_reasons.description: Required addon rulebook is missing and cannot be loaded.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Install or restore the required addon rulebook.

blocked_reasons.description: Activated addons have conflicting ownership or constraints.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Resolve addon conflicts by deactivating or merging conflicting addons.

blocked_reasons.description: Activation outcome differs while input hashes remain unchanged.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Investigate non-deterministic activation and fix input drift.

blocked_reasons.description: Required evidence for rulebook claims is missing.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Provide required evidence artifacts for rulebook verification.

blocked_reasons.description: Workspace memory state is invalid or corrupted.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Reset workspace memory and re-bootstrap.

blocked_reasons.description: Required activation evidence is missing for deterministic resolution.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Provide missing evidence artifacts and rerun activation.

blocked_reasons.description: Persisted SESSION_STATE violates the canonical schema on resume.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Repair or regenerate session state from canonical evidence.

blocked_reasons.description: Golden baseline files were modified in a PR, risking regression masking.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Revert baseline modifications or get explicit approval.

blocked_reasons.description: Phase 2 (Repo Discovery) could not complete.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Ensure valid repo context and retry discovery.

blocked_reasons.description: A recovery routine is required to proceed (explicit recovery gate).
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Run /continue or the defined recovery routine and re-validate SESSION_STATE.

blocked_reasons.description: Phase 4 plan missing required Test Strategy subsection.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Add Test Strategy subsection to Phase 4 plan and re-evaluate P5.3 gate.

blocked_reasons.description: Business rules coverage gap detected (>30% uncovered).
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Ensure at least 70% of discovered business rules have coverage evidence.

blocked_reasons.description: Rollback strategy missing or incomplete for schema/contract changes.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Provide RollbackStrategy with DataMigrationReversible=true or explicit safety steps.

blocked_reasons.description: P5.5 Technical Debt gate not approved before Phase 6 entry.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Set Gates["P5.5-TechnicalDebt"] to "approved" or "not-applicable" and re-evaluate.

blocked_reasons.description: Review decision submitted via /review-decision is invalid or not recognized.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Provide a valid review decision: approve, changes_requested, or reject.

blocked_reasons.description: Phase 4 intake evidence is missing or incomplete for deterministic routing.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Persist canonical ticket/task input with matching digest via the Phase 4 intake bridge.

blocked_reasons.description: Phase 5 plan-record evidence is missing, unreadable, or failed to persist.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Persist Phase 5 plan-record evidence via the plan persist bridge, then rerun materialization.

blocked_reasons.description: Phase 5 plan persistence was requested outside Phase 5.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Run /ticket to enter Phase 5, then rerun /plan.

blocked_reasons.description: Phase 5 plan persistence requires persisted ticket/task evidence.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Persist canonical ticket/task evidence via /ticket before running /plan.

blocked_reasons.description: Phase 5 plan text is empty after canonicalization.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Provide non-empty plan text or a valid plan file and rerun /plan.

blocked_reasons.description: Phase 5 internal self-review revision failed to persist.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Resolve plan-record persistence issues and rerun /plan.

blocked_reasons.description: P6 prerequisites not satisfied: P5 approval, P5.3 pass, P5.4/P5.6 compliance missing.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Complete all prerequisite gates before entering Phase 6 Implementation QA.

blocked_reasons.description: Major deviation between plan-record and actual implementation detected at Phase 6 entry (pipeline mode hard-block).
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Review plan-record.json against actual changes. Update plan or resolve deviations before Phase 6.

blocked_reasons.description: Guard evaluation failed at runtime - transition blocked due to transient evaluation error.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Review guard configuration in guards.yaml. Ensure required state fields are present and valid.

blocked_reasons.description: Pipeline mode requires 0 prompts; interactive prompt requirement detected.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Remove interactive dependencies or switch to user mode.

blocked_reasons.description: Pipeline mode hard-disables human assist; human input was requested.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Ensure operation is fully automated or switch to user mode.

blocked_reasons.description: Pipeline prompt budget exceeded under hard policy.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Reduce prompt usage or adjust mode-specific policy.

blocked_reasons.description: DB_TARGET_PG_MAJOR is not declared for database migrations.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Declare DB_TARGET_PG_MAJOR in project configuration.

blocked_reasons.description: Migration format declaration is missing or mixed without policy.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Define explicit format declaration for migration artifacts.

blocked_reasons.description: Migration contains unsafe operations.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Review and fix unsafe migration operations.

blocked_reasons.description: Migration has no rollback plan.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Add rollback changeset for migration.

blocked_reasons.description: Migration has compatibility issues.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Fix compatibility issues in migration definition.

blocked_reasons.description: Critical pass criterion requires evidence that is entirely missing under principal_strict mode.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Provide the missing evidence artifact for the failing criterion.

blocked_reasons.description: Critical pass criterion evidence is stale (exceeds TTL) under principal_strict mode.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Refresh the stale evidence artifact within the allowed TTL.

blocked_reasons.description: Critical pass criterion score is below dynamic threshold under principal_strict mode.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Improve score to meet or exceed the dynamic threshold for the failing criterion.

blocked_reasons.description: principal_strict is active but no pass criteria are defined for the current phase. Fail-closed: transition is blocked.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Define pass_criteria for this phase in the phase_exit_contract, or disable principal_strict mode.

blocked_reasons.description: Installed file tree does not match install-layout-contract.v_current — missing artifacts, unexpected files, or wrong ownership.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Re-run installer to regenerate missing artifacts and restore layout conformance.

blocked_reasons.description: Runtime state invariants from runtime-state-contract.v1 are violated — pointer semantics, artifact classification, or backup/purge rules breached.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Verify SESSION_STATE.json pointer and workspace integrity, then re-run installer if needed.

blocked_reasons.description: opencode.json integration invariants from opencode-integration-contract.v1 are violated — merge ownership, plugin lifecycle, or uninstall guarantees breached.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Re-run installer to regenerate opencode.json with correct merge ownership and plugin paths.

blocked_reasons.description: Decision receipt validation failed under strict match policy.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Re-render presentation in current gate and rerun decision with a fresh matching receipt.

blocked_reasons.description: Decision receipt validation failed under strict match policy.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Re-render presentation in current gate and rerun decision with a fresh matching receipt.

blocked_reasons.description: Decision receipt validation failed under strict match policy.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Re-render presentation in current gate and rerun decision with a fresh matching receipt.

blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Re-render presentation in current gate and rerun decision with a fresh matching receipt.

blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Re-render presentation in current gate and rerun decision with a fresh matching receipt.

blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Re-render presentation in current gate and rerun decision with a fresh matching receipt.

blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Re-render presentation in current gate and rerun decision with a fresh matching receipt.

blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Re-render presentation in current gate and rerun decision with a fresh matching receipt.

blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Re-render presentation in current gate and rerun decision with a fresh matching receipt.

blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Re-render presentation in current gate and rerun decision with a fresh matching receipt.

blocked_reasons.description: Decision receipt validation failed under strict match policy.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Re-render presentation in current gate and rerun decision with a fresh matching receipt.

blocked_reasons.description: Decision receipt validation failed under strict match policy.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Re-render presentation in current gate and rerun decision with a fresh matching receipt.

blocked_reasons.description: Decision receipt validation failed under strict match policy.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Re-render presentation in current gate and rerun decision with a fresh matching receipt.

blocked_reasons.description: Decision receipt validation failed under strict match policy.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Re-render presentation in current gate and rerun decision with a fresh matching receipt.

blocked_reasons.description: Decision receipt validation failed under strict match policy.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Re-render presentation in current gate and rerun decision with a fresh matching receipt.

blocked_reasons.description: PR review comparison basis could not be validated deterministically.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Refresh remote refs or use isolated fallback with resolvable base/head refs and merge-base.

blocked_reasons.description: PR review comparison basis could not be validated deterministically.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Refresh remote refs or use isolated fallback with resolvable base/head refs and merge-base.

blocked_reasons.description: PR review comparison basis could not be validated deterministically.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Refresh remote refs or use isolated fallback with resolvable base/head refs and merge-base.

blocked_reasons.description: PR review comparison basis could not be validated deterministically.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Refresh remote refs or use isolated fallback with resolvable base/head refs and merge-base.

blocked_reasons.description: PR review comparison basis could not be validated deterministically.
blocked_reasons.remediation_hint: Refresh remote refs or use isolated fallback with resolvable base/head refs and merge-base.

audit_events.description: Repo document contains a directive classified as unsafe.
audit_events.remediation_hint: Remove or neutralize unsafe repo-doc directive and rerun.

audit_events.description: Repo constraint requests widening of write/command scope beyond policy envelope.
audit_events.remediation_hint: Require explicit widening approval or keep within policy constraints.

audit_events.description: Pipeline mode cannot satisfy interactive approval requirements.
audit_events.remediation_hint: Remove interactive requirement or rerun in user/agents_strict mode.

audit_events.description: Prompt budget exceeded for the active mode.
audit_events.remediation_hint: Reduce prompts or increase budget through explicit policy change.

audit_events.description: Persistence action requires explicit operator confirmation evidence.
audit_events.remediation_hint: Record explicit confirmation evidence and retry persistence.

audit_events.description: Provided persistence confirmation evidence is invalid.
audit_events.remediation_hint: Provide exact confirmation token and retry.

audit_events.description: Requested persistence confirmation flow is disallowed in pipeline mode.
audit_events.remediation_hint: Run in user/agents_strict mode with explicit confirmation evidence.

audit_events.description: Persistence artifact is not allowed in the current phase.
audit_events.remediation_hint: Move to required phase/gate and retry.

audit_events.description: Required phase gate approval for persistence is missing.
audit_events.remediation_hint: Complete gate approvals and retry persistence.

audit_events.description: Repo document contains unsupported constraint domains.
audit_events.remediation_hint: Convert unsupported constraint into approved policy domain or ignore as non-authoritative.

audit_events.description: Policy precedence resolution has been applied and logged.
audit_events.remediation_hint: Inspect precedence event payload and involved hash refs.

audit_events.description: Audit reason was unmapped and emitted as warning fallback.
audit_events.remediation_hint: Map audit reason to canonical event or suppress at source.

audit_events.description: Workspace persistence helper reported degraded completion.
audit_events.remediation_hint: Inspect workspace persistence governance and retry.

audit_events.description: Live engine mode was denied by deterministic policy gates.
audit_events.remediation_hint: Adjust requested mode or satisfy policy prerequisites.

audit_events.description: Requested operating mode was downgraded due to capability constraints.
audit_events.remediation_hint: Grant required host capabilities or run with downgraded expectations.

audit_events.description: Execution proceeded under reduced permissions.
audit_events.remediation_hint: Restore missing permissions to recover full deterministic behavior.

audit_events.description: Legacy session-state compatibility mode was used.
audit_events.remediation_hint: Migrate session-state artifacts to canonical field set.

audit_events.description: Required evidence was missing for full verification.
audit_events.remediation_hint: Provide required evidence and rerun deterministic checks.

audit_events.description: Required evidence was present but stale.
audit_events.remediation_hint: Refresh stale evidence and rerun verification.

audit_events.description: Non-critical pass criterion evidence is stale under principal_strict mode.
audit_events.remediation_hint: Refresh the stale evidence artifact within the allowed TTL.

audit_events.description: Non-critical pass criterion evidence is missing under principal_strict mode.
audit_events.remediation_hint: Provide the missing evidence artifact for the failing criterion.

audit_events.description: README documentation has drifted from canonical source.
audit_events.remediation_hint: Sync README with canonical documentation source.

audit_events.description: Schema documentation has drifted from canonical source.
audit_events.remediation_hint: Sync schema docs with canonical schema definitions.

audit_events.description: Manifest references a rulebook that is not present.
audit_events.remediation_hint: Add the missing rulebook or remove the manifest reference.

audit_events.description: Fallback baseline version could not be determined.
audit_events.remediation_hint: Declare explicit fallback baseline version.

audit_events.description: Fallback testing coverage is insufficient.
audit_events.remediation_hint: Add required fallback test coverage.

audit_events.description: Fallback recovery procedure is not specified.
audit_events.remediation_hint: Document explicit fallback recovery procedure.

audit_events.description: Principal evidence for decision traceability is missing.
audit_events.remediation_hint: Provide principal identity evidence for audit trail.

audit_events.description: Scorecard calibration is incomplete for active profile.
audit_events.remediation_hint: Complete scorecard calibration for all active dimensions.

audit_events.description: Risk tier could not be resolved from available evidence.
audit_events.remediation_hint: Provide risk classification evidence or declare tier explicitly.

audit_events.description: OpenAPI spec diverges from observed implementation.
audit_events.remediation_hint: Sync OpenAPI spec with implementation or flag accepted deviation.

audit_events.description: OpenAPI spec version could not be determined.
audit_events.remediation_hint: Declare explicit OpenAPI version in spec metadata.

audit_events.description: Expected OpenAPI spec file is missing.
audit_events.remediation_hint: Add OpenAPI spec at the expected path.

audit_events.description: Breaking API change detected without explicit approval.
audit_events.remediation_hint: Get explicit approval for breaking API change or revert.

audit_events.description: Frontend OpenAPI code generator is unknown or undeclared.
audit_events.remediation_hint: Declare OpenAPI generator in project configuration.

audit_events.description: Frontend OpenAPI client may drift from backend spec.
audit_events.remediation_hint: Verify frontend client generation is synced with backend spec.

audit_events.description: No negative tests for frontend OpenAPI integration.
audit_events.remediation_hint: Add negative test cases for API error paths.

audit_events.description: Frontend OpenAPI source spec could not be resolved.
audit_events.remediation_hint: Provide resolvable path or URL for upstream OpenAPI spec.

audit_events.description: Frontend OpenAPI mapping may have drifted from canonical spec.
audit_events.remediation_hint: Regenerate frontend mappings from canonical OpenAPI spec.

audit_events.description: Contract tests for frontend OpenAPI integration are missing.
audit_events.remediation_hint: Add contract tests verifying frontend-backend API agreement.

audit_events.description: Kafka consumer idempotency is not verified.
audit_events.remediation_hint: Add idempotency verification tests for Kafka consumers.

audit_events.description: Kafka retry policy is unknown or undeclared.
audit_events.remediation_hint: Declare explicit retry policy for Kafka consumers.

audit_events.description: Kafka async processing has flakiness risk in tests.
audit_events.remediation_hint: Stabilize async Kafka test patterns to reduce flakiness.

audit_events.description: Cypress test suite has elevated flakiness risk.
audit_events.remediation_hint: Review and stabilize flaky Cypress test patterns.

audit_events.description: Cypress selectors may be unstable across DOM changes.
audit_events.remediation_hint: Use data-testid or stable selectors for Cypress tests.

audit_events.description: Critical user flows lack Cypress test coverage.
audit_events.remediation_hint: Add Cypress tests for all critical user flows.

audit_events.description: Cypress tests lack network request control.
audit_events.remediation_hint: Add cy.intercept or equivalent network control to Cypress tests.

audit_events.description: Critical path test coverage is missing for Cypress suite.
audit_events.remediation_hint: Add critical path tests to Cypress test suite.

audit_events.description: Cypress tests have async flake risk due to timing issues.
audit_events.remediation_hint: Use proper Cypress waiting strategies to eliminate async flakes.

audit_events.description: Cucumber framework version is unknown or undeclared.
audit_events.remediation_hint: Declare explicit Cucumber version in project configuration.

audit_events.description: Cucumber test runner is unknown or undeclared.
audit_events.remediation_hint: Declare explicit Cucumber runner in project configuration.

audit_events.description: Cucumber naming/tagging conventions are undeclared.
audit_events.remediation_hint: Document Cucumber conventions in project configuration.

audit_events.description: Cucumber tests have elevated flakiness risk.
audit_events.remediation_hint: Review and stabilize flaky Cucumber scenarios.

audit_events.description: No evidence for Cucumber test execution was found.
audit_events.remediation_hint: Provide Cucumber test execution evidence or CI artifacts.

audit_events.description: Java build or test process has non-determinism risk.
audit_events.remediation_hint: Pin Java dependencies and use reproducible build settings.

audit_events.description: Repository build file detected but corresponding build tool is not available on PATH.
audit_events.remediation_hint: Install the missing build tool or add it to PATH, then restart the session.

audit_events.description: Nx tag/project boundary mismatch detected in Angular workspace.
audit_events.remediation_hint: Align project tags and imports to match Nx boundary configuration.

audit_events.description: Multiple state management patterns detected without repo evidence for intentional mix.
audit_events.remediation_hint: Consolidate to the repo-standard state management pattern.

audit_events.description: Async test without deterministic control detected in Angular component.
audit_events.remediation_hint: Add explicit timing/mock control to async test assertions.

audit_events.description: Database migration change without rollback evidence.
audit_events.remediation_hint: Add down-migration and test both upgrade and downgrade directions.

audit_events.description: Async test without deterministic control detected in Python module.
audit_events.remediation_hint: Add explicit async mock/fixture control to ensure test determinism.

audit_events.description: Type checker not available in the environment.
audit_events.remediation_hint: Install mypy or pyright and run against changed modules.

audit_events.description: PostgreSQL version could not be determined for Liquibase migration validation.
audit_events.remediation_hint: Provide PostgreSQL version evidence or configure version in Liquibase properties.

audit_events.description: Liquibase changeset missing rollback definition.
audit_events.remediation_hint: Add rollback section to the changeset and test both directions.

audit_events.description: Liquibase migration may acquire long-held locks on production tables.
audit_events.remediation_hint: Review lock duration, consider online DDL alternatives, or add lock timeout configuration.

audit_events.description: Liquibase data migration changeset has not been verified against realistic data volume.
audit_events.remediation_hint: Run the migration against a staging dataset of representative size and measure duration.

audit_events.description: SESSION_STATE document failed schema or invariant validation.
audit_events.remediation_hint: Fix schema violations or invariant errors. Run schema validation for details.

audit_events.description: Plan-vs-implementation drift detected at Phase 6 entry (non-blocking warning).
audit_events.remediation_hint: Review plan-record.json against actual changes. Minor drift is acceptable; update plan if needed.
